title: After Effects Link For Blender
description:
After Effects Link for Blender

Seamlessly Bridge Blender & After Effects with One Click!

Transform your animation workflow with After Effects Link, the ultimate tool for artists working between Blender and After Effects. This add-on enables instant transfer of renders and sequences from Blender to After Effects—no manual file management needed!

✨ Key Features

🎬 Smart Sequence Handling

✅ Export complete animation sequences or single frames
✅ Automatic sequence detection and proper import into After Effects
✅ Maintains frame order and timing

🔄 Flexible Export Options

✅ Send directly from render cache for instant preview
✅ Export from saved files with full quality
✅ Support for multiple image and video formats

⚡ Automatic Composition Setup

✅ Creates or updates After Effects compositions automatically
✅ Matches resolution and aspect ratio
✅ Centers and scales layers intelligently
✅ Preserves layer names and organization

🎨 Render Channel Support

✅ Handles all common render passes
✅ Supports Cryptomatte, Beauty, RGB, and other channels
✅ Maintains proper channel naming and organization


🚀 How It Works

1️⃣ Render in Blender

  • Create your animation or single frame in Blender
  • Use either viewport render or final render

2️⃣ Export to After Effects

  • Choose between "Cache to After Effects" for quick preview
  • Or "Send to After Effects" for final quality export
  • Select sequence or single frame export

3️⃣ Continue in After Effects

  • Files automatically import into a new or existing composition
  • Layers are properly named and organized
  • Ready for compositing and effects

🖥 System Requirements

✅ Blender 3.0 or later
✅ After Effects CC 2023-2024
✅ Windows 10/11
✅ After Effects must be installed on the system

💡 Why Choose After Effects Link?

✔️ Perfect for motion designers, VFX artists, and animators
✔️ Eliminates tedious file management and import steps
✔️ Maintains creative flow between applications
✔️ Supports professional workflow requirements

🔧 Installation & Support

✅ Simple installation through Blender’s add-on system
✅ Automatic After Effects detection
✅ Detailed documentation included
✅ Support available through BlenderMarket messages

💰 Price: $12

Transform Your Animation Pipeline Today—Get After Effects Link!
Streamline your Blender to After Effects workflow and focus on creating amazing content.

🔗 Tags: Blender Addons, After Effects Integration, Animation Workflow, Compositing, Motion Graphics, VFX Tools
